must_detect.matched_text:
As PIC under the Data Privacy Act, we processed a DSAR from Ms. Althea Dizon on 01 June 2026 (ref DSAR‑2026‑061), providing copy and log of access within 48 hours via privacy@luneta-holdings.example.
On 02 June 2026, Mr. Paolo J. Santos withdrew consent for cross‑border processing of his payroll data; cross‑border transfer to Bayangan Pay Pte. Ltd. (outside the Philippines) for his record was halted and remains blocked until further consent, per our Cross‑Border Data Transfer Policy.
Erasure for Mr. Santos and restriction for Ms. Dizon were completed and recorded in the deletion log (DL‑LHI‑2026‑104) on 02 June 2026, with verification by the DPO’s office.
Data minimisation was applied on 01 June 2026 by masking bank fields and excluding any tax document images from system analytics; retention for onboarding forms remains 24 months per Schedule B of the HR Records Retention Matrix.
Per the Data Processing Agreement (processor contract) with TalaHR Systems OPC, Schedule 2 (Data Categories and Transfers) was updated on 20 May 2026; a separate data‑export approval (Approval ID LHI‑XB‑2026‑04) permits encrypted SFTP payroll updates weekly for active employees only.
No evidence of exfiltration exists; the attempted export job was blocked by our DLP rule set and audit trails confirm zero bytes left the enclave—this completed control does not indicate an ongoing privacy risk.
Review by Capital Markets Compliance confirmed no budgets, guidance, or non‑public financing terms were present in affected systems; therefore, no MNPI as defined under the SRC was accessed.
A current report will be lodged with the Manila Boards Exchange and the Corporate Registries Authority–PH within two business days; director/officer trading blackout remains in force but is unrelated to this event.
For tax and banking workflows, only template fields were touched during the incident; no actual payroll disbursements, tax filings, or investor account records were executed or modified.
Signed by Atty. Lira V. Mendoza, Data Protection Officer; inquiries may be sent to dpo@luneta-holdings.example.
Annex: DPA Schedule 4 (Retention and Minimisation Policy) attached for reference only; its inclusion here is policy‑only and should not be read as notice of a breach.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
